# TimescaleDB compressed-chunk insert verification (R8-2 / E01-3 AC)

**Generated by** `packages/db/__tests__/compressed-insert.spec.ts` — do not hand-edit; re-run the test to refresh.
**Image:** timescale/timescaledb-ha:pg16 · **TimescaleDB:** 2.28.2 · **Date:** 2026-07-04

| Scenario | Outcome |
|---|---|
| INSERT new row into compressed chunk (late buffered record) | WORKS |
| INSERT duplicate PK with ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING into compressed chunk (I3 dedupe) | DEDUPES (rowCount 0) |
| Rows in table after both | 2 |

**Consequence for E04-2 recompute:** no decompress_chunk() fallback needed on this version — direct inserts into compressed chunks preserve both insert and dedupe semantics.
